topic: Oxytocin: not just love, but social anxiety reduction
caption: Did you know oxytocin is more than just the 'love hormone'? 🤗 It plays a crucial role in reducing social anxiety! 💡 Research shows oxytocin levels are lower in individuals with social anxiety disorder. 📊 By increasing oxytocin, you can improve social interactions and reduce anxiety. 🌟 Save this so you don't lose it. Tag a friend who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future self will thank you! 💕 #oxytocin #socialanxiety #mentalhealth #love #hormones #science
